mapper.select: SELECT * FROM insured_person ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT * FROM insured_person WHERE insured_id = #{insured_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO insured_person ( insured_id, customer_id, name, birth_date, gender, relationship, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{insured_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customer_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{relationship, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE insured_person SET customer_id = #{customer_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birth_date = #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE}, gender = #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, relationship = #{relationship, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE insured_id = #{insured_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM insured_person WHERE insured_id = #{insured_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
